rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID LY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/2022 (no earlier date available). No courtesy copy of the petition has been received. The petitioner in pro per was so informed via e-mail on 10/21/2022. The investments on hand proposed to be distributed to the beneficiaries do not appear to be exactly the same as those listed on the inventory and appraisal. Even if the account has been waived, the final report must describe all sales, purchases, and changes in the form of the investments, as required by CRC 7.550(b)(2) & (3). The petitioner was so informed via e-mail on 10/25/2022. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAMONA LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearances required for counsels to address the following issues: Petitioner -(1) If Ms. Lopez has been appointed as Executor by any court. If so, need a certified copy of Letters to be submitted; and (2) Full bond will be needed if petition granted. Objector - the court will not likely determine on the adverse possession issues until a separate action is filed. Also, if the parties will agree on an independent person to be appointed as Administrator. If so, applicable petition must be filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/22. Declaration filed on 10/17/22 alleges that Anna Guevara declined to serve as trustee (which declination was not attached to the declaration, as alleged), which has no bearing on her willingness to serve as the executor of the estate. Either a declination to serve or a verified declaration alleging why a declination cannot be obtained must be filed by 11/7/22. Note: tentative ruling continuances are final and uncontestable and are not subject to Local Rule 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARTHA VIRGINIA GONZALEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/22 for the following: 1) DE-147 (Duties and Liabilites) must be filed. 2) DE-147S (Supplement to Duties and Liabilities) must be filed, which cannot be e-filed (must be filed in person) and must be attached to a cover sheet. 3) Proposed order should be e-lodged (via e-filing). All documents to be filed by 11/7/22. Note: tentative ruling continuances are final and uncontestable and are not subject to Local Rule 14.10.B.
